name: Vennerhus Weine AG
message: Vennerhus Weine AG is a Swiss wine company based in Grosshöchstetten, Canton of Bern. Founded in 1994, the company specializes in the import, trade, and distribution of high-quality wines. In addition to wine sales, Vennerhus offers professional wine tastings, courses, and events designed for both private clients and corporate customers.
